title: Plasma thrower
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''plasma thrower''' was a device similar to a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] that fired explosive bolts of [[Plasma/Legends|plasma]]. It was used by [[clone blaze trooper]]s. A much more powerful version known as a [[plasma burst cannon]] was used by [[SD-10 battle droid|SD-10's]] at the [[Battle of Balmorra]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1999-02-XX -->''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]''
